title: AI Summit Turin
fitReason: Strong match on AI/agents topics and free entry fits any budget.
description: AI Summit Turin is the premier AI event in Northern Italy, gathering leading researchers, practitioners, and founders for a full day of talks, panels, and networking. Expect deep dives into LLM architecture, agentic systems, and real-world AI deployments — no fluff, just substance.
agenda: 09:00 — Keynote: The State of AI Agents in 2026
10:30 — Panel: LLMs in Production — Lessons Learned
15:30 — Workshop: Prompt Engineering for Complex Tasks
perks: Access to all recorded talks post-event

title: Founders Dinner Turin
fitReason: Intimate networking format ideal for finding collaborators and co-founders.
description: An intimate dinner for 30 early-stage founders and select angel investors. Structured around 10-minute introductions per table followed by open networking. Purposely small to keep conversations high-signal. Ideal if you're looking for a co-founder or first check.
agenda: 20:00 — Table introductions round (10 min per person)
perks: Curated guest list — no service providers
Private Slack group for attendees post-event

logistics.venue: Ristorante Del Cambio, Piazza Carignano 2, Turin

title: AI for Healthcare Webinar
fitReason: Relevant AI content in an accessible online format with no cost or travel.
description: A 90-minute online session exploring how LLMs are being deployed in clinical settings — from diagnostic assistance to patient communication. Includes a panel with a hospital CTO, an AI ethics researcher, and a healthcare startup founder. Q&A throughout.
agenda: 14:10 — Talk: LLMs in Clinical Decision Support
14:40 — Panel: Ethics and Accountability in Healthcare AI
perks: Resource pack: papers, tools, datasets shared

title: WebDev Hackathon 2026
fitReason: Hands-on building experience, though focus is frontend rather than AI.
description: A 48-hour remote hackathon for web developers. Build something new with React, Next.js, or any web tech stack. Judged on creativity, code quality, and UX. Prizes sponsored by Vercel and Cloudflare. Solo or team up to 4.
agenda: Day 1 — 09:00: Kickoff, theme reveal, team formation
perks: Project featured on sponsors' social media
All participants get 3-month Vercel Pro free

title: React Advanced Milan
fitReason: High-quality technical content but price and frontend focus reduce fit.
description: A single-track technical conference for senior React engineers. No beginner content — straight to advanced patterns, performance optimization, compiler internals, and React 19 deep dives. 200 attendees cap keeps the quality high. €150 early bird (€220 regular).
agenda: 10:30 — Talk: Server Components in the Wild
16:00 — Panel: The Future of Frontend Architecture

title: UX Design Workshop
fitReason: Useful design skills but not closely aligned with core technical interests.
description: A hands-on 4-hour workshop covering UX research methods, interaction design principles, and advanced Figma techniques. Led by a senior product designer from a top Milan agency. Bring your laptop — you'll design a real interface from scratch during the session.
agenda: 10:00 — UX Research methods: when and how to use them

logistics.venue: Talent Garden Milano Calabiana, Via Arcivescovo Calabiana 6, Milan

title: Open Source Community Day
fitReason: Local and free, but niche open-source focus may not match current goals.
description: A community-run day for open source contributors and enthusiasts in Turin. Short talks, project showcases, and collaborative coding sessions. Great for meeting local developers and discovering interesting projects to contribute to. Bring your laptop.
agenda: 10:30 — Lightning talks: OSS project showcase (5×10 min)
13:30 — Unconference: topic voting and self-organized sessions
perks: Get listed as a contributor on featured projects

logistics.venue: Toolbox Coworking, Via Agostino da Montefeltro 2, Turin

title: B2B SaaS Product Conference
fitReason: B2B SaaS focus is a poor match — topic and audience don't align with profile.
description: A one-day conference for B2B SaaS product leaders and founders. Topics span product-led growth, GTM strategy, pricing models, and customer success. Heavy on case studies from European SaaS companies. Best suited for PMs and growth-focused founders.
agenda: 09:00 — Keynote: B2B SaaS in 2026 — Market Trends
14:00 — Panel: GTM Lessons from €1M to €10M ARR
15:30 — Talk: Customer Success as a Growth Engine
perks: Expo hall with 20+ SaaS tooling vendors

logistics.venue: MiCo Milano Congressi, Piazza Karl Marx, Milan
